_annotation_note: Tier annotations for blind_eval_verdicts.json (verdicts hash 1d0a4d3ed4d2dd4d, committed pre-unseal, UNTOUCHED). This file is a SEPARATE annotation layer — it does not modify the committed verdicts. Created 2026-06-11 per admin recommendation to add NEAR_MISS_REGISTERED_SIGNAL tier to the verdict taxonomy.

tier_definitions.STRUCTURED: Instrument returned p <= corrected alpha; verdict stands; counts in TP/TN accuracy tallies.
tier_definitions.NULL: Instrument returned p > corrected alpha at tested resolution; does not prove absence — bounded by admission power curves. Qualifies as 'below detection at these shapes, not proof of absence'.
tier_definitions.NEAR_MISS_REGISTERED_SIGNAL: Raw p below 0.10 but above corrected alpha; underlying signal is real per ground truth (FN cases) OR noise excursion on a null dataset. Triggers replication or pre-registered follow-up. NEVER counts as STRUCTURED. NEVER used in public claims. See rules below.
tier_definitions.EXPLORATORY_ONLY: GW (G0) outputs or any instrument not yet admitted; correct signal may be present but instrument cannot issue a verdict pending calibration redesign.
tier_definitions.OUT_OF_SCOPE: Structure type is real but no registered claim covers it (coverage gap). Not scored FN. Represents an instrument-gap or registration-scope limitation.

tier_rules.NEAR_MISS_never_STRUCTURED: A NEAR_MISS_REGISTERED_SIGNAL result NEVER counts as STRUCTURED in any accuracy table, public report, or claim. It triggers a pre-registered replication only.
tier_rules.NEAR_MISS_triggers: Replication or pre-registered follow-up experiment, registered before execution, with a multiplicity charge.
tier_rules.NEAR_MISS_no_public_claims: NEAR_MISS results are never cited in public claims, web deliverables, or decision-layer documents.
tier_rules.LATENT_SUPPORTED_sub_tag: When A-Z and B-Z are both STRUCTURED and A-B is NEAR_MISS, the tag LATENT-SUPPORTED/NEEDS-CONFIRMATION may be applied to A-B. This sub-tag is never auto-upgraded to STRUCTURED; it flags a pre-registration target for a direct A-B test at higher power.
tier_rules.coverage_reporting: Registered-claim accuracy (TP/TN/FP/FN) is reported separately from: coverage gaps (OUT_OF_SCOPE), instrument-blocked detections (EXPLORATORY_ONLY), near-threshold detections (NEAR_MISS_REGISTERED_SIGNAL), and out-of-scope structures. These four categories are never pooled with the accuracy tally.

DRAW-STATION-B.note: FN-1: real transient era-bias signal; Sidak m=5 absorbs it. Triggers: pre-registered replication with targeted era-shift instrument (CUSUM/changepoint, see ROADMAP).

DRAW-SUBSET-D.note: Noise excursion on null data; real ground truth is NULL. Near-miss flag does not trigger replication (correct null direction).

DRAW-SUBSET-E.note: Noise excursion on null data; same as DRAW-SUBSET-D.

DRAW-CROSS-A|B.note: Noise excursion; A is pure uniform. No replication triggered (null ground truth).

DRAW-CROSS-D|E.note: FN-2: real latent-sharing signal (z_common); 10-unit family Sidak absorbs it. LATENT-SUPPORTED sub-tag applies: DRAW-SENSOR-D=STRUCTURED and DRAW-SENSOR-E=STRUCTURED confirm z_common is recoverable; direct A-B test at higher power is the pre-registration target.

SERIES-TDA-S2.note: FN-3: instrument-specific miss — fixed τ=3,d=3 delay params do not form persistent H1 loop in S2 encoding. SERIES-RECOVERY-S2 is STRUCTURED confirming underlying structure exists. No NEAR_MISS (p=0.995, anti-signal — not a threshold miss but an instrument-representation limit).

SERIES-PAIR-S1|S2.note: FN-4: instrument-specific miss — circular-shift null destroys phase-indeterminate periodic relation. p=0.7462, not a near-threshold miss. Instrument-representation limit; no NEAR_MISS tier.

SERIES-PAIR-S3|S4.note: Noise; S3 is iid. Null ground truth.

CLOUD-GW-X|Y.note: Real signal (GW p=0.010, ground truth STRUCTURED); suppressed by standing G0 instrument flag established pre-run. CLOUD-TDA-X and CLOUD-TDA-Y are both STRUCTURED, covering detection. GW stays G0 until confirmatory admission suite passes.

GRAPH-PAIR-A|C.note: Noise; C is ER control. Null ground truth.

MATRIX-M2.note: Noise; M2 is iid Gaussian. Null ground truth.

GAP-1.label: OUT_OF_SCOPE
GAP-1.description: Row/number attribution for draws.B (numbers 17 and 42) — no registered claim tests for identity of specific biased numbers. Source: blind_eval_score.md §6 Gap-1.

GAP-2.label: EXPLORATORY_ONLY
GAP-2.description: CLOUD-GW cross-geometry (X|Y): real signal p=0.010 blocked by G0 flag; CLOUD-TDA covers detection. Source: blind_eval_score.md §6 Gap-2.

GAP-3.label: OUT_OF_SCOPE
GAP-3.description: sensor_04 x draws.B era-detection link — pooled panel CCA; individual sensor x stream not separately registered. Source: blind_eval_score.md §6 Gap-3.

GAP-4.label: OUT_OF_SCOPE
GAP-4.description: sensor_02 x draws.D/E individual link — not registered at individual-sensor resolution. Source: blind_eval_score.md §6 Gap-4.

tier_summary.note: NEAR_MISS count includes both null-data excursions (9) and real-signal near-threshold misses (2: DRAW-STATION-B FN-1, DRAW-CROSS-D|E FN-2). Null-data excursions are correctly held below verdict. Real-signal near-misses trigger roadmap items (era-shift detector, higher-power cross-pair CCA).
